GymPost.title: GymPost
GymPost.description: A single social post of a logged workout activity by a team member

dateTime.description: ISO timestamp when the activity occurred

imageUrl.description: Optional image URL representing proof of workout

likesList.description: List of user emails who liked this post to prevent double-likes

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Individual settings, health indicators, and physical history details for a user

name.description: Full display name of the user

weightRecords.description: Array of physical weight/height measurements over time

WeightRecord.title: WeightRecord
WeightRecord.description: A single physical weight and height record tracking progress over time

date.description: ISO timestamp when the weight measurement was performed

FrequencyRecord.title: FrequencyRecord
FrequencyRecord.description: A workout check-in entry marking the date and the day of the week derived from the user's timeline activity

postId.description: ID of the associated post on the timeline

date.description: ISO timestamp when the activity occurred

dayOfWeek.description: Short form representation of the day (e.g. seg, ter, qua, qui, sex, sab, dom)

dayName.description: Full name of the day of the week in Portuguese

userEmail.description: Email identifier of the active user

userName.description: Display name of the active user

/posts/{postId}.description: Global activity feed of all team workouts

/users/{userId}.description: Athlete medical/profile states managed by direct key matching

/users/{userId}/weightRecords/{recordId}.description: Subcollection tracking weight and height records over time

/users/{userId}/frequencies/{frequencyId.description: Subcollection tracking specific workout frequency of days and dates
